title: RESOURCEDIR
text: RESOURCEDIR Specifies the directory that temporarily holds the downloadable resources. <init-param> <param-name> RESOURCEDIR </param-name> <param-value> DirectoryPath </param-value> </init-param> Default value if omitted: Servlet Attribute jakarta.servlet.context.tempdir . You can set this attribute in the Servlet Container. Note: This parameter has no effect in a self-contained web application, which does not access folders or files outside of the virtual root. Related Links web.xml Configuration file of the web application. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
